title: Mushoku Tensei
description:
With the help of this resource, you will be able to play with items from the anime Mushoku Tensei, renamed anvil bow,sword,breastplate,shield,
carved pumpkin.
body:
# Need ([Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)) or ([CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn))
Changes the Minecraft model to a custom one when renaming items such as the bow, sword, carved pumpkin, breastplate, and shield in anvils.
Items and how to rename them are written below.
![GIF](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/t6v4mTun/images/70cb1b62c88498bb5decdd86636e68a66bf4c055.gif)
## Bow

- Wand Sylphiette 1

- Wand Sylphiette 2

- Roxy Staff

- Rudeus Staff

- Bow Sara

## Sword

- Ruijerd Spear

- Sword Paul

- Sword Ghislaine

- Sword Elinalise

- Sword Eris 1

- Sword Eris 2

## Carved Pumkin

- Bandage

- Glasses Fitts

- Glasses Fitts Pixel

- Roxy Hat

## Breastplate

- Amulet Roxy

- Amulet Sylphiette

- Amulet Sylphiette

## Shield

- Shield Elinalise
___________________________________________________________________________
- To remodel an item, rename a compatible weapon in an anvil to its name.

![Anvil](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/t6v4mTun/images/5892959db3aa246cce4cb2356d07beadf4c6561e.png)
